    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[BrandId], [p].[BrandId1], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DatasheetPath], [p].[DescriptionEn], [p].[DescriptionVi], [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[MachineTypeId], [p].[MachineTypeId1], [p].[NameEn], [p].[NameVi], [p].[ShortDescriptionEn], [p].[ShortDescriptionVi], [p].[SlugEn], [p].[SlugVi], [p].[TechnicalSpecsEn], [p].[TechnicalSpecsVi], [p].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Code] AS [Code0], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [c].[DisplayOrder] AS [DisplayOrder0], [c].[IconPath], [c].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c].[NameEn] AS [NameEn0], [c].[NameVi] AS [NameVi0], [c].[SlugEn] AS [SlugEn0], [c].[SlugVi] AS [SlugVi0], [c].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [b].[Id] AS [Id1], [b].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [b].[DisplayOrder] AS [DisplayOrder1], [b].[IsActive] AS [IsActive1], [b].[LogoPath], [b].[Name], [b].[Slug]
    FROM [Product] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Brand] AS [b] ON [p].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[SlugEn] = @__slug_0 OR [p].[SlugVi] = @__slug_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImage] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1]

INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Brand] AS [b] ON [p].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [MachineType] AS [m] ON [p].[MachineTypeId] = [m].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImage] AS [p0] ON [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [p].[DisplayOrder], [p].[CreatedAt] DESC, [p].[Id], [c].[Id], [b].[Id], [m].[Id]
